Who I Am

About Me

I am a Network Engineering graduate with experience in networking, CCTV systems, and IT infrastructure. I have completed an HND in Network Engineering along with CCNA and CCNP certifications.

I am currently working at Technology Solution Provider (TSP), where I handle networking, CCTV systems, and IT support solutions. I am skilled in switching, routing, troubleshooting, CCTV installation, access control, and network design.

I am passionate about learning new technologies and improving my skills in networking and security systems. I always focus on providing reliable and professional IT solutions.
